title: Juliette Burton Sexy Nerdy Work In Progress
description: Every night a different nerdy work in progress show! Villain Era: As the sun sets, a new antihero awakens. Calling all big-hearted heroes! Award-winning comedian Juliette Burton is summoning YOU. Join the dark side in a comedy quest for grown-up geeks and justice-hungry joy seekers ready to battle the REAL dragons: inequality and bad sex lives. It’s time to iron out the kinks! Live nerdgasms possible. " Fun, fabulous, relatable, and a safe space for nerds." ★★★★ Edinburgh Reviews ★★★★★ Starburst “Liberating” ★★★★★ VoiceMag Side Quest: The multiverse needs heroes. Luckily, there’s a room full of you. Collaboration is key, chaos is guaranteed and laughter is your ultimate power-up. You don't just watch the show - you play it. Board To Distraction: Board games meet brainpower: Fast-paced fun where everyone leaves smarter, smugger and significantly more competitive. When comedy and board games collide, there’s no chance of being bored!
content_warnings: A silly and sexy show about sex positivity with brief mention of darker sides of sex
